---
title: "Time Series Analysis of Ventura County Wildfires"
subtitle: "SARIMA and ARMAX Models for Wildfire Activity"
author: "Edgar Gonzalez Martinez"
format: html
editor: visual
---


```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)

sample_start <- as.Date("2000-02-01")
sample_end <- as.Date("2020-12-01")

monthly_full <- read_csv("ventura_wildfires_monthly_1992_2020.csv",
                         show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(month = as.Date(month))

monthly_model <- monthly_full |>
  filter(
    month >= sample_start,
    month <= sample_end
  ) |>
  mutate(
    log_fire_count = log1p(fire_count),
    log_acres = log1p(total_acres_burned)
  )
```

## Key Visuals

```{r}
#| label: fig-fire-count
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-cap: "Monthly wildfire starts in Ventura County, 2000–2020."

ggplot(monthly_model, aes(x = month, y = fire_count)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Monthly wildfire starts",
    title = "Monthly Wildfire Starts in Ventura County"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-log-fire-count
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-cap: "Log-transformed monthly wildfire starts used for SARIMA modeling."

ggplot(monthly_model, aes(x = month, y = log_fire_count)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "log(1 + wildfire starts)",
    title = "Log-Transformed Monthly Wildfire Starts"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-log-acres
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| fig-cap: "Log-transformed monthly acres burned used for wildfire severity modeling."

ggplot(monthly_model, aes(x = month, y = log_acres)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "log(1 + acres burned)",
    title = "Log-Transformed Monthly Acres Burned"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
